creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
I want to apologize for my mistake, as described in commit log,
I forgot to bump github tag when moving pkg-provides from 0.7.2
to 0.73. As sa result, package 0.7.3 was in real a 0.7.2 as
reported by pkg plugins command.

I fix the hash in head (bumping PORTREVISION) and did an MFH to
propagate the changes on 2023Q1 branch.
